title: Expedition Led by Sa 'd b. Abi Waggas
description: In this year, in Dhu al-Qa'dah, the Messenger of God entrusted to Sa'd b. Abi Waggas a white banner (for an expedition) to alKharrar. It was carried by al-Migdad b. 'Amr.23 According to Abu Bakr b. Ismail-his father-'Amir b. (1266( Sa'd-his father: I set out on foot at the head of twenty men (or, twenty-one men). We used to lie hidden by day and march at night, until we reached al-Kharrar on the fifth morning.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
